---
title: "DO Regimes"
author: "CLB"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(here)
source(here("Code/paths+packages.R"))
library(preMetabolizer)
library(furrr)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(corrr)
library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
library(beepr)
library(glue)
library(cowplot)
library(ggExtra)
library(caret)
library(randomForest)
library(gganimate)
set.seed(4) # For reproducibility
gpSites <- c("#1b9e77", "#d95f02", "#7570b3")
```

# Load Data

```{r}
sheet_id <- "1uQquFaVpRFs5y4UDBrqKtq1Oo3dW7zXLwFoIv-gle6g"
sheet_names <- c("Talladega", "Paint Rock", "Weyerhaeuser")

all_sheets <- map(sheet_names, \(name) {
  read_sheet(sheet_id, sheet = name, col_types = "c") |>
    mutate(Site = name)
})

seMaint <- bind_rows(all_sheets) |> 
    janitor::clean_names() |> 
  mutate(
    temp_c = coalesce(temp_c, temperature_c),
    stage_m = coalesce(staff_gauge_height_m, staff_gauge_height),
    # Safely combine date + time
    Date = mdy(date)
  ) |> 
  select(Site = site, Date, connected = connected_and_flowing, upstream = upstream_tribs_flowing, site_notes, do_mg_l, stage_m, temp_c) |> 
  mutate(
    connected = str_to_lower(connected),
    upstream = str_to_lower(upstream),
    flow_state = case_when(
      connected == "yes" ~ "Flowing",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "yes" ~ "Pooled",
      connected == "no" & upstream == "no" ~ "Dry",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  mutate(
    flow_state = case_when(
      (flow_state %in% c("Dry", NA)) &
        str_detect(str_to_lower(site_notes), "\\b(flow|flowing|pool|pooled|isolated|low)\\b") ~ "Pooled",
      TRUE ~ flow_state
    )
  ) |> 
  select(Site, Date, wetQf = flow_state) |> 
  mutate(
    Site = case_when(
      str_starts(Site, "T") ~ "TAL",
      str_starts(Site, "W") ~ "WHR",
      str_starts(Site, "P") ~ "PRF",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ))
```

```{r}
flowObs <- read_csv(here("Metadata/FlowObs.csv"))

streamLight <- read_csv(here("Data/streamLight/predLight/all_sites_results.csv")) |> 
  rename(Site = Site_ID) |> 
  mutate(
    Date = as_date(local_time),
    Site = case_when(
    Site == "SFM01" ~ "KNZ",
    Site == "SHM01" ~ "SHN",
    Site == "ENM01" ~ "YMR",
    TRUE ~ Site  # keep other values unchanged
  )) |> 
    group_by(Site, Date) |>
  summarise(maxPar = max(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            avgPar = mean(PAR_surface, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

gpDat <- fread(here("Data/GP_dailyData.csv")) |> 
  select(-minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp, -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs, -dPercCon, -wetdry_SW) |> 
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |> 
  left_join(streamLight, by = c("Site", "Date")) 
seDat <- fread(here("Data/SE_dailyData.csv")) |> 
  select(-minDO.obs, -maxDO.obs, -avgDO.obs, -DO.hyp, -DO.amp, -probHyp, -dayProbConc, -nightProbConc, -NHR_obs) |> 
  mutate(Date = as_date(Date)) |> 
  full_join(seMaint)



allDat <- gpDat |> 
  full_join(seDat) |> 
  select(-excProb, -DOSat.exc) |> 
  mutate(waterYear = as.factor(calcWaterYear(Date)),
         Season = as.factor(get_season(Date)),
         Date = as.Date(Date),
         DOY = as.numeric(format(Date, "%j")),
         DOY_sin = sin(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date))),
         DOY_cos = cos(2 * pi * DOY / (365 + leap_year(Date)))
         ) |> 
  select(-totalDO) |> 
    group_by(Site) |> 
    mutate(excProb = calc_exceedance_prob(Q_1d, rm.zero = T),
           DOSat.exc = calc_exceedance_prob(avgDO.pctsat, rm.zero = T)) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
  group_by(Site, waterYear) |> 
  mutate(excProb_WY = calc_exceedance_prob(Q_1d, rm.zero = T)) |> 
  ungroup()

# Calculate stage thresholds for each site
flowThresh <- allDat |>
  drop_na(wetQf) |>
  group_by(Site, wetQf) |>
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(Depth_1d, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  filter(wetQf == "Pooled" & !is.na(mean) & !is.na(sd)) |>
  mutate(thresh = mean + sd) |>
  dplyr::select(Site, thresh)

# Assign flowState based on threshold
allDat <- allDat |>
  left_join(flowThresh, by = "Site") |>
  mutate(across(
    .cols = matches("Depth_|maxDepth|minDepth"),
    .fns = \(x) ifelse(x < 0, 0, x)
  )) |> 
  mutate(
    percentConnected = percentConnected/100,
    flowState = case_when(
      is.na(thresh) ~ NA_character_,
      Depth_1d > thresh ~ "Flowing",
      TRUE ~ "Pooled"
    )
  )

## New Alpha centrality
sticAC <- read_csv(here("Data/STICs/streamDAG_metrics.csv")) |> 
  rename(Date = date, Site = watershed)

allDat <- allDat |> 
  select(-c(ICSL, AlphaCentrality, Harary)) |> 
  left_join(sticAC)

dailyHydro <- allDat|>
  select(Site, Date, wetQf, PercWet_1d, PercWet_7d, PercWet_14d, PercWet_30d, PercWet_60d,
         dPercWet_1d, dPercWet_7d, dPercWet_14d, dPercWet_30d, dPercWet_60d,
         minDepth, maxDepth, Depth_1d, Depth_7d, Depth_14d, Depth_30d, Depth_60d,
         minQ, maxQ, Q_1d, Q_7d, Q_14d, Q_30d, Q_60d, excProb,
         PPT_1d, PPT_7d, PPT_14d, PPT_30d, PPT_60d,
         a_cent, upstream_length, percentConnected, DOY, DOY_sin, DOY_cos)

dailyDat <- allDat |> 
  drop_na(avgDO.pctsat)

rm(streamLight, gpDat, seDat)
```

# Check out data

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false

dailyDat |>
  pivot_longer(cols = where(is.numeric),
               names_to = "Variable",
               values_to = "Value") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = Value)) +
  geom_histogram(fill = "#3cb44b") +
  facet_wrap( ~ Variable, scales = "free") +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "Histograms of Variables", x = "Value", y = "Frequency")

dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = excProb, y = Q_1d, color = Site)) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "log10",
    labels = label_number()
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Discharge Exceedance Probability (%)",
    y = bquote("Discharge ("*L~s^{-1}*")")
  ) +
  #facet_wrap(~waterYear, ncol = 1) +
  theme_few() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL)) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 20),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> excProb
ggsave(filename = "excProb.png", plot = excProb, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOSat.exc, y = avgDO.pctsat, color = Site)) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
  x = "DO Exceedance Probability (%)",
  y = expression("Daily Mean DO"["% Sat"])
  )+
  theme_few() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL)) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 20),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 20),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 20),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 20),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 20),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> doExcProb
ggsave(filename = "DO_ExcProb.png", plot = doExcProb, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = excProb, y = DOSat.exc, color = Site)) +
  geom_line(na.rm = TRUE, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    trans = "log10",
    labels = label_number()
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    x = "Exceedance Probability (%)",
    y = bquote("DO (% Sat)")
  ) +
  #facet_wrap(~waterYear, ncol = 1) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = NULL))

wetQf_colors <- c("Flowing" = "#0077BB", "Pooled" = "#BBBB00", "Dry" = "#E69F00")

dailyHydro |> 
  drop_na(wetQf) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = Depth_1d, color = wetQf)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wetQf_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Surface Water Depth (m)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 1, scales = "free") 
dailyHydro |> 
  drop_na(wetQf) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = Q_1d, color = wetQf)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = wetQf_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Discharge (L/s)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, ncol = 1, scales = "free") 

dailyHydro |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = PercWet_1d, color = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Discharge (L/s)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

# StreamDAG vs % Wet

```{r}
dailyDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(a_cent = scale(a_cent)[, 1]) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = percent_network_wet, y = a_cent, color = DOY)) +
  geom_point(na.rm = TRUE) +
  scale_color_distiller(palette = "Spectral") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = "% Wet", y = "Alpha Centrality") +
  theme_few() +
  facet_wrap(~Site) -> p
p
ggsave(filename = "AC_PercWet.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/STICs"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")


dailyDat |>
  mutate(Year = year(Date), 
         Month = factor(lubridate::month(Date, label = T))) |>
  filter(!Month %in% c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec")) |> 
  group_by(Site, Month) |> 
  summarise(Q = mean(Q_1d, na.rn = T)) |> 
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(Month), y = log1p(Q), fill = Site)) +
  #geom_point(na.rm = TRUE) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = okabeIto)+
  #scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(x = "Month") +
  theme_few()
p
```

# Temporal Autocorrelation

```{r}
dailyDat |> 
  filter(Site == "KNZ") |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = DOY, y = avgPar)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = ""  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
vars <- c("avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc", "percent_network_wet", "a_cent", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth_1d", "Q_1d", "excProb", "avgPar", "PPT_1d")#, "DOpctsat.amp_diff", "DOSat.exc_diff")# "avgDO.pctsat", "PercWet_1d", "alpha_cent", "upstream_length", "percentConnected","Depth_1d", "Q_1d", "excProb",

dailyDat <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(c(avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc), 
         ~ c(NA, diff(.x)),
         .names = "{.col}_diff")) |> 
  ungroup()

dat_long <- dailyDat |>
  select(Site, Date, all_of(vars)) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(Site, Date), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value")

calc_acf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  acf_out <- acf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = acf_out$lag[,1,1],
    acf = acf_out$acf[,1,1],
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}
calc_pacf <- function(x, max_lag = 90) {
  n_obs <- sum(!is.na(x))
  ci <- 1.96 / sqrt(n_obs)
  pacf_out <- pacf(x, lag.max = max_lag, plot = FALSE, na.action = na.pass)
  tibble(
    lag = pacf_out$lag,
    pacf = pacf_out$acf,
    ci_upper = ci,
    ci_lower = -ci
  )
}

acf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(acf_tbl = list(calc_acf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(acf_tbl)

pacf_results <- dat_long |>
  group_by(Site, metric) |>
  arrange(Date) |>
  summarise(pacf_tbl = list(calc_pacf(value)), .groups = "drop") |>
  unnest(pacf_tbl)

acf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = acf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#D6EAF8", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#0072B2", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "ACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "ACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

pacf_results |>
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = pacf)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "gray50", linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper), fill = "#F8CFC3", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#D55E00", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ Site, scales = "fixed") +
  labs(
    title = "Partial Autocorrelation",
    x = "Lag (days)", y = "PACF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) -> p
p
#ggsave(filename = "PACF.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
```

# DO Metrics PCA

```{r}
gpSens <- c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")
pcaDat <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc, probHypSat, minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na()

#PCA
# Select columns for PCA
doPCA <- pcaDat |>
  select(avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc, probHypSat, minDO.pctsat, maxDO.pctsat) |>
  drop_na() |>  # Remove rows with missing values
  prcomp() 

#extract loadings
doPCA |>
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")

#Variance explained
doPCA |>
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")

#Scree plot
fviz_eig(doPCA, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 2)
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 3)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(
  doPCA,
  geom = "point",
  habillage = pcaDat$Site,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  col.var = "black",
  repel = TRUE) +
  labs(title = "") +
  scale_color_few()+
  scale_fill_few()+
  #scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  labs(color = "Site", shape = "Site", fill = "Site") +
  theme_few() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")-> pcaPlt
pcaPlt

# Add marginal histograms
ggMarginal(
  pcaPlt,
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE
)
# Set descriptive variable labels
var_labels <- c(
  avgDO.pctsat = "Avg.",
  DOpctsat.amp = "Amplitude",
  DOSat.exc = "Exceedence Probability",
  probHypSat = "Probability of Hypoxia",
  minDO.pctsat = "Min",
  maxDO.pctsat = "Max"
)

# Rename the variable labels in the PCA object
rownames(doPCA$rotation) <- var_labels[rownames(doPCA$rotation)]

# Re-run biplot with new labels
pcaPlt <- fviz_pca_biplot(
  doPCA,
  geom = "point",
  habillage = pcaDat$Site,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  col.var = "black",
  repel = TRUE
) +
  labs(title = "Daily DO Metrics") +
  scale_color_few() +
  scale_fill_few() +
  labs(color = "Site", shape = "Site", fill = "Site") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") 
pcaPlt
ggsave(filename = "DO_PCA_sfs.png", plot = pcaPlt, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

# Add marginal histograms
ggMarginal(
  pcaPlt,
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE
)

pcaPlt <- fviz_pca_biplot(
  doPCA,
  geom = "point",
  habillage = pcaDat$Site,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  col.var = "black",
  repel = TRUE,
  labelsize = 6,  # increase for variable labels (try 6–8 for slides)
  pointsize = 3,       # control size here
  point.alpha = 0.5    # control alpha here
) +
  labs(title = expression(paste("Daily DO"["% Sat"], " Metrics")))+
  scale_color_few() +
  scale_fill_few() +
  labs(color = "Site", shape = "Site", fill = "Site") +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

pcaPlt
# Save at high resolution, large size for slides
ggsave(
  filename = "DO_PCA_sfs.png",
  plot = pcaPlt,
  path = here("Figs/"),
  device = "png",
  width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm",
  dpi = 600 
)

# Add marginal histograms
ggMarginal(
  pcaPlt,
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE
)

```

```{r}
pcaDat <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc) |>
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na()

#PCA
# Select columns for PCA
doPCA <- pcaDat |>
  select(avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc) |>
  drop_na() |>  # Remove rows with missing values
  prcomp() 

#extract loadings
doPCA |>
  tidy(matrix = "loadings")

#Variance explained
doPCA |>
  tidy(matrix = "eigenvalues")

#Scree plot
fviz_eig(doPCA, addlabels = TRUE)

#Qual of representation
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 1)
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 2)
fviz_cos2(doPCA, choice = "var", axes = 3)

#Biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(
  doPCA,
  geom = "point",
  habillage = pcaDat$Site,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  col.var = "black",
  repel = TRUE,
  pointsize = 3,       
  point.alpha = 0.5    
) +
  scale_color_few()+
  scale_fill_few()+
  #scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  #scale_fill_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  labs(color = "Site", shape = "Site", fill = "Site") +
  theme_few() + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")-> pcaPlt
pcaPlt

# Add marginal histograms
ggMarginal(
  pcaPlt,
  type = "density",
  groupColour = TRUE,
  groupFill = TRUE
)


ggsave(filename = "DO_PCA.png", plot = pcaPlt, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")


pca_scores <- as.data.frame(doPCA$x) |>
  select(PC1, PC2, PC3) |>
  bind_cols(pcaDat |> select(Site, Date))


# majority_rule <- NbClust::NbClust(data = pca_scores |> select(-Site, -Date), 
#                                   distance='euclidean', 
#                                   min.nc = 2, max.nc = 9, 
#                                   method="ward.D2", 
#                                   index = "all") |> 
#   (\(x) {
#     tbl <- table(x$Best.nc["Number_clusters", ])
#     as.numeric(names(tbl)[which.max(tbl)])
#   })()

set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
k_clusters <- kmeans(pca_scores |> select(PC1, PC2), centers = 3, nstart = 25)

# Add cluster assignment to data
pca_scores <- pca_scores |> 
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(k_clusters$cluster))

ggplot(pca_scores, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "K-means Clustering on PCA Scores",
       x = "PC1", y = "PC2") +
  scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```

# NMDS

```{r}
# # Step 1: Prepare data
# ordData <- dailyDat |>
#   select(Site, Date,
#          # community (DO regime)
#          avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc, #) |>
#          # environmental variables
#          alpha_cent, upstream_length, percentConnected, minQ, maxQ, Q_1d, excProb,
#          maxDepth, PPT_1d, PercWet_1d, avgPar, water.temp, DOY) |>
#   drop_na()
# 
# # Step 2: Separate community and environment matrices
# comm <- ordData |>
#   select(avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc)
# 
# env <- ordData |>
#   select(alpha_cent, upstream_length, percentConnected, minQ, maxQ, Q_1d, excProb,
#          maxDepth, PPT_1d, PercWet_1d, avgPar, water.temp, DOY)
# 
# # Step 3: Run NMDS (2 dimensions)
# set.seed(42)
# nmds <- metaMDS(comm, distance = "bray", k = 2, try = 50, maxtry = 200, autotransform = TRUE)
# stressplot(nmds)
# # Step 4: Fit environmental vectors
# fit <- envfit(nmds, env, permutations = 999)
# 
# # Step 5: Extract NMDS scores and bind metadata
# nmds_scores <- scores(nmds, display = "sites") |> as_tibble() |>
#   bind_cols(ordData |> select(Site, Date))
# 
# # Step 6: Plot NMDS with environmental vectors
# nmds_plot <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = Site, shape = Site)) +
#   geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
#   #stat_ellipse(aes(group = Site), linetype = "dashed") +
#   scale_color_manual(values = okabeIto) +
#   labs(title = "NMDS - DO Regime Structure",
#        x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
#   theme_few() #+
#   #theme(legend.position = "bottom")
# 
# # Add envfit arrows
# arrow_df <- as.data.frame(scores(fit, display = "vectors"))
# arrow_df$var <- rownames(arrow_df)
# # Add envfit arrows
# nmds_plot <- nmds_plot +
#   geom_segment(
#     data = arrow_df,
#     aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
#     inherit.aes = FALSE,  # CRITICAL: prevents looking for 'Site' in arrow_df
#     arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
#     color = "black"
#   ) +
#   geom_text_repel(
#     data = arrow_df,
#     aes(x = NMDS1 * 1.1, y = NMDS2 * 1.1, label = var),
#     inherit.aes = FALSE, 
#     size = 3,
#     color = "black"
#   )
# nmds_plot
# nmds_scores <- scores(nmds, display = "sites") |> 
#   as.data.frame() |> 
#   bind_cols(ordData |> select(Site, Date))  # Add metadata
# 
# # 
# # majority_rule <- NbClust::NbClust(data = nmds_scores |> select(-Site, -Date), 
# #                                   distance='euclidean', 
# #                                   min.nc = 2, max.nc = 9, 
# #                                   method="ward.D2", 
# #                                   index = "all") |> 
# #   (\(x) {
# #     tbl <- table(x$Best.nc["Number_clusters", ])
# #     as.numeric(names(tbl)[which.max(tbl)])
# #   })()
# 
# set.seed(123)
# k_clust <- kmeans(comm, centers = 3)  # try 2–6 clusters
# 
# nmds_scores$Cluster <- factor(k_clust$cluster)
# clusterColors <- c("1" = "#BBBB00", "2" = "#E69F00", "3" = "#0077BB")
# ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = Cluster, shape = Site)) +
#   # Points with custom aesthetics
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.5) +
#   # Cluster ellipses (using cluster grouping)
#   #stat_ellipse(aes(group = Cluster, color = Cluster),linetype = "dashed",linewidth = 0.8, show.legend = FALSE) +
#   # Custom color scale (clusters)
#   scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors) +
#   # Labels and theme
#   labs(
#     title = "DO Regime Clusters in NMDS Space", x = "NMDS1", y = "NMDS2") +
#   theme_few() +
#   theme(
#     legend.position = "right",
#     legend.box = "vertical"
#   ) +
#   # Separate legends for color (cluster) and shape (site)
#   guides(
#     color = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "Cluster"),
#     shape = guide_legend(order = 2, title = "Site")
#   ) +
#   geom_segment(
#     data = arrow_df,
#     aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = NMDS1, yend = NMDS2),
#     inherit.aes = FALSE, 
#     arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.25, "cm")),
#     color = "black"
#   ) +
#   geom_text_repel(
#     data = arrow_df,
#     aes(x = NMDS1 * 1.1, y = NMDS2 * 1.1, label = var),
#     inherit.aes = FALSE, 
#     size = 3,
#     color = "black"
#   )
# 
# table(nmds_scores$Cluster, nmds_scores$Site)
# fviz_nbclust(nmds_scores[, 1:2], kmeans, method = "silhouette")  # optimal k
# sil <- silhouette(k_clust$cluster, dist(nmds_scores[, 1:2]))
# mean(sil[, "sil_width"])  # closer to 1 is better
# 
# 
# # 1. Add cluster assignments to your original data
# ordData_with_clusters <- ordData |> 
#   mutate(Cluster = factor(k_clust$cluster))
# 
# # 2. Create the plot
# ggplot(ordData_with_clusters, aes(x = Date, y = avgDO.pctsat, color = Cluster)) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
#   facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free_x") + 
#   scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors) +
#   labs(title = "Dissolved Oxygen (% Saturation) by Cluster",
#        x = "Date",
#        y = "DO (% saturation)",
#        color = "Cluster") +
#   theme_few() +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
# 
# library(gganimate)
# 
# nmds_scores <- scores(nmds, display = "sites") |> 
#   as.data.frame() |> 
#   bind_cols(ordData |> select(Site, Date, DOY)) |> 
#   arrange(DOY) |>
#   mutate(DateLabel = as.Date(DOY, origin = "1999-12-31"))  
# 
# nmds_anim <- ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = DOY)) +
#   geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 1.5) +
#   scale_color_viridis_c() +
#   ggtitle(
#     "NMDS - DO Regime",
#     subtitle = '{format(frame_time, "%b %d")}'
#   ) +
#   theme_few() +
#   transition_time(DateLabel)
# 
# 
# # Animate it
# nmds_gif <- animate(nmds_anim, width = 800, height = 600, fps = 15, duration = 10, renderer = gifski_renderer())
# # Save as GIF
# anim_save("~/Desktop/nmds.gif", animation = nmds_gif)
# 

```

# NbClust

```{r}
# nbDat <- dailyDat |>
#   select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc) |> 
#   group_by(Site) |>
#   mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
#   ungroup() |> 
#   drop_na()
# nbDat <- dailyDat |>
#   select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc) |>
#   drop_na()
# 
# 
# majority_rule <- NbClust::NbClust(data = nbDat |> select(-Site, -Date), 
#                                   distance='euclidean', 
#                                   min.nc = 2, max.nc = 9, 
#                                   method="ward.D2", 
#                                   index = "all") |> 
#   (\(x) {
#     tbl <- table(x$Best.nc["Number_clusters", ])
#     as.numeric(names(tbl)[which.max(tbl)])
#   })()
```

# K-Means

## All Sites DO

```{r}
# Define cluster colors
#clusterColors <- c("1" = "#228833", "2" = "#66CCEE", "3" = "#AA3377")
clusterColors <- c("1" = "#0077BB", "2" = "#E69F00", "3" = "#BBBB00")

# Select DO columns and drop missing values
kmDat <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, DOpctsat.amp, DOSat.exc) |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na()

# K-means clustering
kmeans_result <- kmDat |> 
  select(-Site, -Date) |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  eclust(FUNcluster = "kmeans",  # Use K-means clustering
         k = 3,                 # Number of clusters
         nstart = 25,           # Number of random starts for K-means
         graph = F) 

# Visualize clusters
kmeans_result |> 
  fviz_cluster(geom = "point", ggtheme = theme_few())+
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clusterColors) 

# Create a cluster column
kmDat <- kmDat |> 
  mutate(cluster = kmeans_result$cluster) |> 
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(case_when(
           cluster == 1 ~ 3,
           cluster == 3 ~ 2,
           cluster == 2 ~ 1,
           TRUE ~ cluster)))

# Perform PCA
kmeansPCA <- kmDat |> 
  select(-Site, -Date, -cluster) |> 
  prcomp()

# Visualize PCA with biplot
fviz_pca_biplot(kmeansPCA, geom = "point", habillage = kmDat$Site,
                addEllipses = TRUE, 
                ellipse.level = 0.95,
                col.var = "black", 
                repel = TRUE)+
  scale_shape_cleveland()+
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Dark2") + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  theme_few()

# Extract PCA scores (observation positions in PCA space)
kmeansScores <- kmeansPCA |> 
  tidy(matrix = "scores") |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = PC, values_from = value) |> 
  select(PC1 = `1`, PC2 = `2`) |> 
  bind_cols(kmDat)  # Attach Site & Cluster info
  
# Extract PCA loadings (variable influence on components)
kmeansLoadings <- as.data.frame(kmeansPCA$rotation) |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "Variable") |> 
  mutate(PC1 = PC1 * max(abs(kmeansScores$PC1)) * 0.9,  # Scale arrows
         PC2 = PC2 * max(abs(kmeansScores$PC2)) * 0.9)  
# Set descriptive variable labels
var_labels <- c(
  avgDO.pctsat = "Avg.",
  DOpctsat.amp = "Amplitude",
  DOSat.exc = "Exceedance Probability"
)

# Apply new labels to the variable arrows
kmeansLoadings <- kmeansLoadings |>
  mutate(Variable = var_labels[Variable])
# PCA with Site shapes
p <- ggplot(kmeansScores, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, color = cluster, shape = Site)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.5) +  # Points with site-based shapes
  stat_ellipse(aes(group = cluster, fill = cluster, color = cluster, shape = NULL), geom = "polygon", alpha = 0.2) +  
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = clusterColors) +  # Fill colors for ellipses
  #scale_shape_cleveland() +
  #scale_color_few()+
  #scale_fill_few()+
  scale_shape()+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_segment(data = kmeansLoadings, aes(x = 0, y = 0, xend = PC1, yend = PC2),
               arrow = arrow(length = unit(0.3, "cm")), color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE) +  # Arrows for variables
  geom_text(data = kmeansLoadings, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, label = Variable),
            vjust = -0.5, color = "black", inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 6) +  # Labels for variables
  labs(title = "DO Metrics Clustered by K-Means",
       x = paste0("Dim1 (", round(summary(kmeansPCA)$importance[2, 1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("Dim2 (", round(summary(kmeansPCA)$importance[2, 2] * 100, 1), "%)"),
       color = "Cluster",
       fill = "Cluster",
       shape = "Site") +
  theme_few()+
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )
p
# Add marginal histograms
# p <- ggMarginal(
#   p,
#   type = "density",
#   groupColour = TRUE,
#   groupFill = TRUE
# )
#p
# Save the plot
ggsave(filename = "KmeansPCA_sfs.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

# Add cluster information back to the original dataset
dailyDat <- dailyDat |>
  select(-matches("clusters")) |> 
  left_join(kmDat |> select(Site, Date, clusters = cluster), by = c("Site", "Date"))
```

### Cluster Time-series

```{r}

doDates <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  mutate(Year = year(Date)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(avgDO.pctsat)) |>
  group_by(Site, Year) |>
  summarise(
    first_date = min(Date),
    last_date = max(Date),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |> 
  mutate(WinterStart_preY = as.Date(paste0(as.integer(as.character(Year))-1, "-12-01")),
         WinterStart = as.Date(paste0(as.integer(as.character(Year)), "-12-01"))) |> 
  mutate(WinterStart = case_when(Site == "YMR" & Year == "2021"~ as_date("2021-12-20"), T~WinterStart),
         WinterStart_preY = case_when(Site == "YMR" & Year == "2022"~ as_date("2021-12-20"), T~WinterStart_preY)) |> 
  mutate(WinterStart_preY = case_when(Site == "SHN" & Year == "2023" ~ NA, T~WinterStart_preY))

# Create separate data frame for the SHN pre-first-date grey box
preFirstDate_SHN <- doDates |>
  filter(Site == "SHN") |>
  mutate(xmin = as.Date("2021-06-01"),  # or your actual xlim min
         xmax = first_date,
         ymin = -Inf,
         ymax = Inf) |> 
  filter(Year == "2023")


# Create the plot
dailyDat |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = avgDO.pctsat, color = clusters)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = WinterStart_preY, xmax = first_date, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#42d4f4", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = last_date, xmax = WinterStart, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#9A6324", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_rect(data = preFirstDate_SHN,
          aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = ymin, ymax = ymax),
          inherit.aes = FALSE,
          fill = "grey5", alpha = 0.2) +
  ylim(0,100)+
  scale_x_date(labels = date_format("%b '%y")) +
  xlim(as_date("2021-06-01"), as_date("2024-12-01"))+
  theme_few() +
  #scale_x_date(date_labels = "%b %Y", breaks = scales::breaks_pretty(n = 5))+
  labs(
  x = "",
  y = expression("Daily Average DO"["% Sat"])
  )+
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> p 
p
ggsave(filename = "clusterTime.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = 600)


clusterTS <- dailyDat |> 
  select(Site, Date, avgDO.pctsat, clusters) |> 
  full_join(dailyHydro, by = c("Site", "Date")) |> 
  mutate(PercWet_1d = PercWet_1d * 100)

doDates <- doDates |> 
  filter(Year == "2024") |> 
  mutate(WinterStart_preY = as_date("2024-01-01"))

clusterTS |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  filter(year(Date) == 2024) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = avgDO.pctsat, color = clusters), size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = WinterStart_preY, xmax = first_date, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#42d4f4", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = last_date, xmax = WinterStart, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#9A6324", alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster", na.translate = FALSE) +
  scale_x_date(labels = date_format("%b"), breaks = "2 months") +
  ylab(
    label = expression("Daily Average DO"["% Sat"])) +
  ylim(0,100)+
  xlim(as_date("2024-01-01"), as_date("2024-12-01")) +
  theme_few() +
  labs(x = "") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> p 

p
ggsave(filename = "cluster2024.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = 600)

clusterTS |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  filter(year(Date) == 2024) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date)) +
  geom_point(aes(y = avgDO.pctsat, color = clusters), size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_line(aes(y = PercWet_1d), color = "black", size = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = WinterStart_preY, xmax = first_date, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#42d4f4", alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_rect(data = doDates,
            aes(xmin = last_date, xmax = WinterStart, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            fill = "#9A6324", alpha = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster", na.translate = FALSE) +
  scale_x_date(labels = date_format("%b"), breaks = "2 months") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 100),
    name = expression("Daily Average DO"["% Sat"]),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ ., name = "Network Wet (%)")  # Identity transformation
  ) +
  xlim(as_date("2024-01-01"), as_date("2024-12-01")) +
  theme_few() +
  labs(x = "") +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> p 

p
ggsave(filename = "cluster2024_PercWet.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = 600)
```

\

```{r}

# Daily Min
dailyDat |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = minDO.pctsat, color = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  #scale_color_few()+
  #scale_fill_few()+
  theme_few() +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Minimum DO % Saturation"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

dailyDat |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |>
ggplot(aes(x = Date, y = maxDO.pctsat, color = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  #scale_color_few()+
  #scale_fill_few()+
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "",
    y = "Max DO % Saturation"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

dailyDat |> 
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = DOSat.exc, y = avgDO.pctsat, color = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  #scale_color_few()+
  #scale_fill_few()+
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Exceedance Probability (%)",
    y = "DO Saturation (%)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent())+
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

# Create month column and calculate frequencies
cluster_freq <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  #filter(!(Site == "YMR" & year(Date) == "2023")) |> 
  mutate(Month = factor(lubridate::month(Date, label = T))) |>
  group_by(Site, Month, clusters) |>
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') |>
  mutate(clusters = factor(clusters))

monthlyPercWet <- dailyHydro |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |>
  #filter(!(Site == "YMR" & year(Date) == 2023)) |>
  mutate(Month = factor(lubridate::month(Date, label = TRUE))) |>
  group_by(Site, Month) |>
  summarise(meanPercWet = mean(PercWet_1d, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, .groups = "drop")

cluster_freq |> 
  filter(!Month %in% c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec", "Jan")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Month, y = count, fill = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  geom_point(
    data = monthlyPercWet |> filter(!Month %in% c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec", "Jan")),
    aes(x = Month, y = meanPercWet / 100),  # scale to proportion
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3,
    shape = 21,
    fill = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> p
p
ggsave(filename = "clusterDist_PercWet.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = 600)


cluster_freq |> 
  filter(!Month %in% c("Oct", "Nov", "Dec")) |> 
ggplot(aes(x = Month, y = count, fill = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  #scale_color_few()+
  #scale_fill_few()+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Proportion"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 18),          # overall text size
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),   # legend entries
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),  # legend title
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),    # axis titles
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),     # axis tick labels
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.margin = grid::unit(c(0, 0, 0, 0), "lines"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> p 
p
ggsave(filename = "clusterDist.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 25.4, units = "cm", dpi = 600)


# Create month column and calculate frequencies
cluster_freq_flow <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |> 
  mutate(Month = factor(lubridate::month(Date, label = T))) |>
  group_by(Site, flowState, clusters) |>
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') |>
  mutate(clusters = factor(clusters))

# Create the plot
cluster_freq_flow |>
  ggplot(aes(x = flowState, y = count, fill = factor(clusters))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(width = 0.9)) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = count),
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.9),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 5
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~Site, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .1)))+
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  ) -> clustFlow


library(ggsignif)


dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |>
  mutate(upstream_length_km = upstream_length / 1000) |>
  ggboxplot(
    x = "flowState",
    y = "upstream_length_km",
    color = "flowState",
    palette = "jco",  # or use your own color palette
    add = "jitter"
  ) +
  #facet_wrap(~Site)+
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Flowing", "Pooled")), 
              map_signif_level=TRUE)+
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Flow State",
    y = "Upstream Length (km)"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "none"
  )-> upstreamFlowState


dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% gpSens) |>
  ggboxplot(
    x = "flowState",
    y = "PercWet_1d",
    color = "flowState",
    palette = "jco",  # or use your own color palette
    add = "jitter"
  ) +
  #facet_wrap(~Site)+
  geom_signif(comparisons = list(c("Flowing", "Pooled")), 
              map_signif_level=TRUE)+
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "Flow State",
    y = "% Wet"
  ) +
  theme_few() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 18),
    legend.position = "none"
  )-> percWetFlowState

clustFlow
upstreamFlowState
percWetFlowState


ggsave(filename = "clusterByFlowstate.png", plot = clustFlow, 
         path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", create.dir = TRUE,
         width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

ggsave(filename = "usFlowstate.png", plot = upstreamFlowState, 
         path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", create.dir = TRUE,
         width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

ggsave(filename = "percWetFlowstate.png", plot = percWetFlowState, 
         path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", create.dir = TRUE,
         width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
```

# Variables by Global Clusters

```{r}
#| include: false


# Prepare standardized dataset first
standardizedDat <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(across(
    where(is.numeric) & !starts_with(c("PercWet", "dPerc", "DOY")) & 
      !any_of(c("DOSat.exc", "excProb", "clusters")), 
    ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
    .names = "{.col}"
  )) |> 
  ungroup()

# Get numeric variable names
vars <- names(select(dailyDat, where(is.numeric), -clusters))

# Plan parallel processing
plan(multisession, workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1) 

# Function to create and save plots
plot_and_save <- function(var) {
  p <- ggplot(standardizedDat, aes(
    x = as.factor(clusters),
    y = .data[[var]],
    color = as.factor(clusters))) +
    geom_boxplot(na.rm = TRUE, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_jitter(alpha = 0.2, na.rm = TRUE) +
    #scale_color_manual(values = clusterColors, name = "Cluster") +
    scale_color_few()+
    scale_fill_few()+
    labs(title = var, x = "Cluster", y = "Value", fill = "Cluster") +
    theme_few() +
    theme(legend.position = "none") +
    facet_wrap(~Site, ncol = 3)

  # Save the plot
  ggsave(filename = paste0(var, "_box.png"), plot = p, 
         path = here("Figs/Clusters"), device = "png", create.dir = TRUE,
         width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")
}

# Run in parallel
future_map(vars, plot_and_save, .options = furrr_options(seed = T))

# Clean up parallel backend
plan(sequential)
```

# Flow State Classification

```{r}
library(themis)
library(smotefamily)

hydro_data <- dailyHydro |>
  #filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR")) |> 
  filter(!is.na(wetQf)) |>
  mutate(wetQf = factor(wetQf, levels = c("Dry", "Pooled", "Flowing"))) 

set.seed(123)
data_split <- initial_split(hydro_data, prop = 0.8, strata = wetQf)
train_data <- training(data_split)
test_data  <- testing(data_split)

rec <- recipe(wetQf ~ ., data = train_data) |>
  step_rm(Date) |> 
  step_impute_bag(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors()) |>
  step_dummy(Site, one_hot = TRUE) |>
  step_upsample(wetQf, over_ratio = 1) # Slight adjustment to over_ratio

rf_spec <- rand_forest(
  mtry = tune(),
  trees = tune(),
  min_n = tune()
) |>
  set_mode("classification") |>
  set_engine("ranger", 
             importance = "permutation",
             class.weights = c("Dry" = 2, "Pooled" = 1.5, "Flowing" = 1),
             num.threads = parallel::detectCores()-1)

wf <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(rec) |>
  add_model(rf_spec)

cv_folds <- vfold_cv(train_data, v = 5, strata = wetQf)

rf_grid <- grid_random(
  mtry(range = c(2L, 33L)),           # All predictors
  min_n(range = c(2L, 10L)),
  size = 30
)
# rf_grid <- grid_regular(
#   mtry(range = c(2L, 20L)),
#   min_n(range = c(2L, 10L)),
#   levels = 5
# )

rf_grid <- grid_space_filling(
  mtry(range = c(3L, 20L)),
  min_n(range = c(2L, 15L)),
  size = 40,  # Try 40 combinations of parameters
  trees(range = c(300, 900))
  )

rf_tuned <- tune_grid(
  wf,
  resamples = cv_folds,
  grid = rf_grid,
  metrics = metric_set(accuracy, kap, roc_auc)
)

best_params <- select_best(rf_tuned, metric = "accuracy")
final_rf <- finalize_workflow(wf, best_params)
rf_fit <- fit(final_rf, data = train_data)



# Evaluate 
rf_preds <- predict(rf_fit, test_data) |> 
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, test_data, type = "prob")) |>
  bind_cols(test_data |> select(wetQf))

# Precision by class
precision_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
  yardstick::precision(truth = wetQf, estimate = .pred_class)

# Recall by class
recall_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
  yardstick::recall(truth = wetQf, estimate = .pred_class)

# F1 by class
f1_multiclass <- rf_preds |>
  yardstick::f_meas(truth = wetQf, estimate = .pred_class)


rf_preds |> conf_mat(truth = wetQf, estimate = .pred_class)
rf_preds |> conf_mat(wetQf, .pred_class) |> autoplot(type = "heatmap")

rf_fit |> 
  extract_fit_parsnip() |>
  vip::vip()

# ROC curves
rf_preds |> 
  roc_curve(truth = wetQf, .pred_Dry, .pred_Pooled, .pred_Flowing) |> 
  autoplot()

# PR curves
rf_preds |> 
  pr_curve(truth = wetQf, .pred_Dry, .pred_Pooled, .pred_Flowing) |> 
  autoplot()
rf_preds |> roc_auc(truth = wetQf, 
                    .pred_Dry, .pred_Pooled, .pred_Flowing,
                    estimator = "macro_weighted")


# Predict on all rows in dailyHydro (even those with NA wetQf)
predData <- dailyHydro |>
  mutate(wetQf = factor(wetQf, levels = c("Dry", "Pooled", "Flowing"))) 

# Predict on it
flowPreds <- predict(rf_fit, predData) |>
  bind_cols(predict(rf_fit, predData, type = "prob")) |> 
  rename(wetQf_pred = .pred_class)

# Attach to dailyHydro
dailyHydro_with_preds <- bind_cols(
  dailyHydro,
  flowPreds
)

ggplot(dailyHydro_with_preds, aes(x = Date, y = Depth_1d, color = wetQf_pred)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Flow State",
    y = "Depth (m)",
    x = "Date",
    color = "Predicted State"
  ) +
  theme_few()+
  theme(legend.title = element_blank())

ggplot(dailyHydro_with_preds, aes(x = Date, y = Q_1d, color = wetQf_pred)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
  facet_wrap(~ Site, scales = "free") +
  labs(
    title = "Predicted Flow State",
    y = bquote("Discharge ("*L~s^{-1}*")"),
    x = "Date",
    color = "Predicted State"
  ) +
  theme_few()
```

# Piecewise SEM

```{r}
library(piecewiseSEM)
library(lme4)

rm(list = setdiff(ls(), c("dailyDat", "allDat")))
gc()
source(here("Code/Functions/prune_sem.R"))


semDat <- dailyDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !starts_with(c("PercWet", "dPerc", "DOY")) & !any_of(c("DOSat.exc", "excProb")), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  )  |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)


# Precipitation as distal predictor
PPT_1d <- lm(PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat)
  # Metabolism/Light 
avgPar <- lmer(avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site), data = semDat)
water.temp <- lmer(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site), data = semDat)
# Depth
Depth_1d <- lmer(Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + excProb + headGradient_1d + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|Site), data = semDat)
# Discharge
excProb <- lmer(excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + percentConnected + 
                       alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|Site), data = semDat)
#Groundwater inputs
headGradient_1d <- lmer(headGradient_1d ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + percentConnected + 
                  alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|Site), data = semDat)
# Network connectivity drivers
percentConnected <- lmer(percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site) , data = semDat)
alpha_cent <- lmer(alpha_cent ~ water.temp +  avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site) , data = semDat)
upstream_length <- lmer(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + alpha_cent + percentConnected + 
                         PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site), data = semDat)
PercWet_1d <- lmer(PercWet_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + upstream_length + alpha_cent + 
                    PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +  (1|Site), data = semDat)
# DO responses
DOSat.exc <- lmer(DOSat.exc ~  water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + alpha_cent + 
                     upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site), 
                     data = semDat)

DOpctsat.amp <- lmer(DOpctsat.amp ~ DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected +
                      alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d + avgPar + 
                      DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|Site), data = semDat)
  
# Define the piecewise SEM
sem_model <- psem(
  PPT_1d, avgPar, water.temp, Depth_1d, excProb, headGradient_1d, percentConnected, alpha_cent, upstream_length,
  PercWet_1d, DOSat.exc, DOpctsat.amp
)

sem_summary <- summary(sem_model)
plot_sem_graph(sem_summary, file = "~/Desktop/origSem.png")
# # Evaluate fit
# semSummary <- sem_model |> summary()
# names(semSummary$coefficients) <- c("Response", "Predictor", "Estimate", "Std.Error", "DF",
#                                      "Crit.Value", "P.Value", "Std.Estimate")
# semSummary$coefficients <- semSummary$coefficients[, !is.na(colnames(semSummary$coefficients))]
```

```{r}
pruned_sem <- prune_sem(
  sem_model,
  data = semDat,
  alpha = 0.05,
  max_iter = 20
  )

pruned_summary <- summary(pruned_sem)
plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = "~/Desktop/prunedSem.png")
```

```{r}
library(easystats)
library(blavaan)

semDat <- dailyDat |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !starts_with(c("PercWet", "dPerc", "DOY")) & !any_of(c("DOSat.exc", "excProb")), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  )  |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(
    lag_DOSat.exc = lag(DOSat.exc),
    lag_DOpctsat.amp = lag(DOpctsat.amp)
  ) |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)
sem_mod <- c('
  # Precipitation (exogenous)
  PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos
  
  # Light availability
  avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos
  
  # Water temperature
  water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos
  
  # Depth model
  Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
              excProb + headGradient_1d + percentConnected + alpha_cent +
              upstream_length + PercWet_1d
  
  # Discharge probability
  excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
            percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d
  
  # Groundwater inputs
  headGradient_1d ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
                   percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d
  
  # Network connectivity
  flow_state =~ percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d
  flow_state ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos
  percentConnected ~~ alpha_cent
  upstream_length ~~ PercWet_1d
  # DO responses
  DOSat.exc ~ prior("normal(0.7, 0.2)")*lag_DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected +
              alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d +
              avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos
  
  DOpctsat.amp ~ prior("normal(0.5, 0.2)")*lag_DOpctsat.amp + DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb +
                percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d +
                headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos
')
fit <- sem(sem_mod, data = semDat, missing = "FIML", estimator = "MLR", parallel = T)
sem_sum <- summary(fit)
result <- remove_weak_paths(
  model = sem_mod,              # Your original fit object 
  data = semDat,          # Your dataset
  missing = "FIML",       # Missing data handling
  estimator = "MLR"       # Estimatort is "FIML")
)

fit_pruned <- summary(result)
```

```{r}
library(brms)
full_model <- 
  # Precipitation model (distal predictor)
  bf(PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  
  # All other models specified separately
  bf(avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + 
       excProb + headGradient_1d + percentConnected + 
       alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d) +
  bf(excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + 
       percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d) +
  bf(headGradient_1d ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + 
       percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d) +
  bf(percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(alpha_cent ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + alpha_cent + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(PercWet_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + upstream_length + alpha_cent + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos) +
  bf(DOSat.exc ~ water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + 
       alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + ar(Date, gr = Site)) +
  bf(DOpctsat.amp ~ DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + 
       percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + 
       headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + ar(Date, gr = Site))
fit <- brm(
  formula = full_model,
  data = semDat,
  family = gaussian(),
  chains = 4,  # Start with fewer chains for testing
  cores = 4,
  iter = 2000,  # Start with fewer iterations
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.95)
)
```

```{r}
mod <- modificationIndices(fit, sort = TRUE)
semPlot::semPaths(fit, "std", "est", style = "lisrel")
bsem_fit <- bsem(sem_mod, 
           data = semDat,
           n.chains = 4,
           burnin = 2000,
           sample = 2000,
           target = "stan"
          )
           #dp = dpriors(lambda = "dnorm(0, 0.1)"),  # Slightly regularizing prior
           #sample.cov.rescale = TRUE,  # Try rescaling covariance matrix
           #em.h1.iter.max = 10000)  # For partial pooling across sites
library(nlme)
library(lme4)
library(glmmTMB)

semDat <- dailyDat |>
  filter(Site %in% c("KNZ", "SHN", "YMR", "TAL")) |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !starts_with(c("PercWet", "dPerc", "DOY")) & !any_of(c("DOSat.exc", "excProb")), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  )  |> 
  ungroup() |> 
 # mutate(Site = as.factor(Site)) |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, DOpctsat.amp) |> 
  mutate(date_num = as.factor(Date))

library(glmmTMB)


sem_model <- psem(
  PPT_1d = lm(PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  # Metabolism/Light
  avgPar = glmmTMB(
    avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  # Water temperature
  water.temp = glmmTMB(
    water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos,
    data = semDat
  ),
  # Depth
  Depth_1d = glmmTMB(
    Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
      excProb + headGradient_1d + percentConnected + alpha_cent +
      upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  # Discharge
  excProb = glmmTMB(
    excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
      percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  # Groundwater inputs
  headGradient_1d = glmmTMB(
    headGradient_1d ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
      percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  # Network connectivity
  percentConnected = glmmTMB(
    percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  alpha_cent = glmmTMB(
    alpha_cent ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected +
      PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  upstream_length = glmmTMB(
    upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + alpha_cent + percentConnected +
      PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  PercWet_1d = glmmTMB(
    PercWet_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + upstream_length +
      alpha_cent + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos,
    data = semDat
  ),
  # DO responses
  DOSat.exc = glmmTMB(
    DOSat.exc ~ water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected +
      alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d +
      avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
      (1 | Site) + ar1(date_num + 0 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  
  DOpctsat.amp = glmmTMB(
    DOpctsat.amp ~ DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb +
      percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d +
      headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos +
      (1 | Site) + ar1(date_num + 0 | Site),
    data = semDat
  ),
  data = semDat
)


sem_summary <- summary(sem_model)
plot_sem_graph(sem_summary, file = "~/Desktop/origSem_autoCor.png")

```

```{r}
pruned_sem <- prune_sem(
  sem_model,
  data = semDat,
  alpha = 0.1,
  max_iter = 20,
  parallel = T
  )
pruned_summary <- summary(pruned_sem)
plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = "~/Desktop/prunedSem.png")
```

\
\

```{r}
sem_model <- psem(
  # Precipitation as distal predictor
  PPT_1d =  lm(PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  # Metabolism/Light 
  avgPar = lm(avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  water.temp = lmer(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  # Depth
  Depth_1d = lmer(Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + excProb + headGradient_1d + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  # Discharge
  excProb = lm(excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d, data = semDat),
  # Vertical Head Gradient
  headGradient_1d = lmer(headGradient_1d ~ avgPar + water.temp + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  # Network Connection
  percentConnected = lmer(percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear) , data = semDat),
  alpha_cent = lmer(alpha_cent ~  upstream_length + water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear) , data = semDat),
  upstream_length = lm(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  PercWet_1d = lmer(PercWet_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + upstream_length + alpha_cent + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  
  # DO responses
  DOSat.exc = lm(DOSat.exc ~ water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  DOpctsat.amp = lm(DOpctsat.amp ~ DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + headGradient_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  data = semDat
)

sem_model <- summary(sem_model)
plot_sem_graph(sem_model)
```

```{r}

pruned_sem <- prune_sem(
  sem_model,
  data = semDat,
  alpha = 0.01,
  )

pruned_summary <- summary(pruned_sem)
plot_sem_graph(pruned_summary, file = "~/Desktop/prunedSem.png")
```

# SEM W/O GW

```{r}

semDat <- dailyDat |>
  select(-starts_with("head")) |> 
  group_by(Site) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    across(
      where(is.numeric) & !starts_with(c("PercWet", "dPerc", "DOY")) & !any_of(c("DOSat.exc", "excProb")), 
      ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), 
      .names = "{.col}"
    )
  )  |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na(DOSat.exc, avgDO.pctsat)


sem_model <- psem(
  # Precipitation as distal predictor
  PPT_1d =  lm(PPT_1d ~ DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  # Metabolism/Light 
  avgPar = lm(avgPar ~ PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  water.temp = lmer(water.temp ~ avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  # Depth
  Depth_1d = lmer(Depth_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + excProb + percentConnected +
                    alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  # Discharge
  excProb = lm(excProb ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d, data = semDat),
  # Network Connection
  percentConnected = lmer(percentConnected ~ water.temp + avgPar + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear) , data = semDat),
  alpha_cent = lmer(alpha_cent ~  upstream_length + water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear) , data = semDat),
  upstream_length = lm(upstream_length ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  PercWet_1d = lmer(PercWet_1d ~ water.temp + avgPar + percentConnected + upstream_length + alpha_cent + PPT_1d + DOY_sin + DOY_cos + (1|waterYear), data = semDat),
  
  # DO responses
  DOSat.exc = lm(DOSat.exc ~ water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  DOpctsat.amp = lm(DOpctsat.amp ~ DOSat.exc + water.temp + PPT_1d + Depth_1d + excProb + percentConnected + alpha_cent + upstream_length + PercWet_1d + avgPar + DOY_sin + DOY_cos, data = semDat),
  data = semDat
)

sem_model <- summary(sem_model)
plot_sem_graph(sem_model)
```

# Response and Predictor Variables

```{r}
rm(list = setdiff(ls(), "dailyDat"))
gc()
dailyDat <- dailyDat |> 
  as_tibble()
# Response Variables
DOvars <- c("minDO.pctsat", "maxDO.pctsat", "avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc")

# Predictor Variable Groups
flow_vars <- c("minQ", "maxQ", "Q_1d", "Q_7d", "Q_14d", "Q_30d", "Q_60d", "excProb")
precip_vars <- c("PPT_1d", "PPT_7d", "PPT_14d", "PPT_30d", "PPT_60d")
depth_vars <- c("Depth_1d", "Depth_7d", "Depth_14d", "Depth_30d", "Depth_60d")
stic_vars <- c("PercWet_1d", "PercWet_7d", "PercWet_14d", "PercWet_30d", "PercWet_60d")
network_vars <- c("ICSL", "IntactStreamLength", "alpha_cent")
delta_vars <- c("dPercWet_7d", "dPercWet_14d", "dPercWet_30d", "dPercWet_60d")

all_predictors <- c(flow_vars, precip_vars, depth_vars, stic_vars, network_vars, delta_vars, "waterYear", "Season")


# Combine all predictor groups into a list
predictor_groups <- list(
  flow = flow_vars,
  precip = precip_vars,
  depth = depth_vars,
  stic = stic_vars,
  network = network_vars,
  delta = delta_vars
)
```

# RF Variable Importance

```{r}
library(randomForest)
set.seed(123)

scaledData <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric)& !any_of(c("clusters", "siteClusters")), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na()


rf_model <- randomForest(clusters ~ ., data = scaledData |> dplyr::select(all_of(c("clusters", flow_vars, precip_vars, depth_vars, stic_vars, delta_vars, network_vars, "waterYear", "Season"))), importance = TRUE)
varImpPlot(rf_model)

# Extract variable importance
var_imp_df <- importance(rf_model) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "Variable") |>
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseGini))

# Plot variable importance
ggplot(var_imp_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, MeanDecreaseGini), y = MeanDecreaseGini)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "Variable Importance For Clusters",
       x = "Predictor Variables",
       y = "Importance") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") ->p 
p
  ggsave(filename = "ClusterVarImportance.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

```

## Multiresponse RF

```{r}
library(randomForestSRC)
library(ggRandomForests)


rf_data <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
   select(all_of(c(DOvars, all_predictors))) |> 
  mutate(waterYear = factor(waterYear, ordered = T),
         Season = factor(Season, ordered = T))

rf_formula <- as.formula(paste("cbind(", paste(DOvars, collapse = ", "), ") ~", 
                                paste(all_predictors, collapse = " + ")))
# Fit the Multivariate Random Forest model
mvrf_model <- rfsrc(
  formula = rf_formula,
  data = rf_data,
  importance = TRUE
)
plot(mvrf_model)

# Extract variable importance from each response variable
var_imp_list <- lapply(DOvars, function(response) {
  importance_values <- mvrf_model$regrOutput[[response]]$importance
  data.frame(Variable = names(importance_values),
             Importance = importance_values,
             Response = response)
})

# Combine all response variable importances into one dataframe
var_imp_df <- bind_rows(var_imp_list)


# Plot variable importance for all response variables
ggplot(var_imp_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, Importance), y = Importance, fill = Response)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "Variable Importance for Each Response Variable",
       x = "Predictor Variables",
       y = "Variable Importance") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")


# Compute mean importance across all response variables
var_imp_avg <- var_imp_df |> 
  group_by(Variable) |> 
  summarise(AvgImportance = mean(Importance, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


# Plot mean variable importance
ggplot(var_imp_avg, aes(x = reorder(Variable, AvgImportance), y = AvgImportance)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_few() +
  labs(title = "Mean Variable Importance Across DO Metrics",
       x = "Predictor Variables",
       y = "Mean Variable Importance") +
  theme(legend.position = "none") -> p
p
ggsave(filename = "varImportance.png", plot = p, path = here("Figs/"), device = "png", width = 25.4, height = 14.2875, units = "cm", dpi = "retina")

# Define predictor groups
predictor_groups <- list(
  Flow = flow_vars,
  Precip = precip_vars,
  Depth = depth_vars,
  STIC = stic_vars,
  Network = network_vars,
  Delta = delta_vars,
  Temporal = c("waterYear", "Season") # Add Temporal predictors
)


# Identify the most important variable in each predictor group
top_vars_by_group <- lapply(names(predictor_groups), function(group) {
  group_vars <- predictor_groups[[group]]
  var_imp_avg |> 
    filter(Variable %in% group_vars) |> 
    arrange(desc(AvgImportance)) |> 
    slice_head(n = 3) |> 
    mutate(Group = group)
})

# Combine results into a single dataframe
top_vars_df <- bind_rows(top_vars_by_group)

# Display results
print(top_vars_df)

```

# GAM W/ Important Vars

```{r}
library(mgcv)
library(MuMIn)
library(furrr)
library(future)



# Extract the top predictor variables
selected_predictors <- top_vars_df$Variable

# Center, scale, and drop extra vars
gam_data <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(all_of(c(DOvars, selected_predictors))) |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  mutate(waterYear = as.factor(waterYear),
         Season = as.factor(Season))

  

# Separate numeric and categorical predictors
numeric_vars <- selected_predictors[!selected_predictors %in% c("waterYear", "Season")]
categorical_vars <- selected_predictors[selected_predictors %in% c("waterYear", "Season")]

# Define the fit_and_dredge function
fit_and_dredge <- function(response,
                           numeric_vars,
                           categorical_vars,
                           gam_data) {
  tryCatch({
    # Create formula for full GAM model
    formula_str <- paste(response,
                         "~",
                         paste(paste0("s(", numeric_vars, ")"), collapse = " + "),
                         if (length(categorical_vars) > 0)
                           paste("+", paste(categorical_vars, collapse = " + "))
                         else
                           "")
    
    formula <- as.formula(formula_str)
    
    # Fit the full GAM model
    full_gam <- mgcv::bam(
      formula,
      data = gam_data,
      method = "fREML",
      na.action = na.fail,
      select = T
    )
    
    # Extract actual term names as they appear in the model
    model_terms <- getAllTerms(full_gam)
    
    # Define predictor groups (now matching exact term names from GAM)
    predictor_groups <- list(
      Flow = intersect(model_terms, c("s(minQ)", "s(Q_60d)")),
      Precip = intersect(model_terms, c("s(PPT_30d)", "s(PPT_14d)")),
      Depth = intersect(model_terms, c("s(Depth_7d)", "s(Depth_1d)")),
      STIC = intersect(model_terms, c("s(PercWet_60d)", "s(PercWet_14d)")),
      Network = intersect(model_terms, c("s(IntactStreamLength)", "s(ICSL)")),
      Delta = intersect(model_terms, c(
        "s(dPercWet_60d)", "s(dPercWet_14d)"
      ))
    )
    
    # Filter out empty groups (if a variable was not included in the model)
    predictor_groups <- predictor_groups[lengths(predictor_groups) > 1]
    
    # Construct the subset condition dynamically
    subset_expression <- as.expression(substitute(
      !(Flow1 & Flow2) &
        !(Precip1 & Precip2) &
        !(Depth1 & Depth2) &
        !(STIC1 & STIC2) &
        !(Network1 & Network2) &
        !(Delta1 & Delta2),
      list(
        Flow1 = as.name(predictor_groups$Flow[1]),
        Flow2 = as.name(predictor_groups$Flow[2]),
        Precip1 = as.name(predictor_groups$Precip[1]),
        Precip2 = as.name(predictor_groups$Precip[2]),
        Depth1 = as.name(predictor_groups$Depth[1]),
        Depth2 = as.name(predictor_groups$Depth[2]),
        STIC1 = as.name(predictor_groups$STIC[1]),
        STIC2 = as.name(predictor_groups$STIC[2]),
        Network1 = as.name(predictor_groups$Network[1]),
        Network2 = as.name(predictor_groups$Network[2]),
        Delta1 = as.name(predictor_groups$Delta[1]),
        Delta2 = as.name(predictor_groups$Delta[2])
      )
    ))
    
    # Run dredge
    gam_dredge <- MuMIn::dredge(full_gam,
                                rank = "AICc",
                                subset = subset_expression)
    
    
    return(gam_dredge)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Error fitting model for response variable: ", response)
    message("Error message: ", e$message)
    return(NULL)
  })
}

# Set up parallel backend to use all available cores
plan(multisession, workers = availableCores())  # Use all available cores

# Apply the function to each response variable in parallel
best_gam_models <- future_map(DOvars, function(response) {
  fit_and_dredge(response, numeric_vars, categorical_vars, gam_data)
}, .options = furrr_options(seed = TRUE), .progress = T)

plan(sequential)
# Store models with their response variable names
names(best_gam_models) <- DOvars
```

```{r}
library(mgcViz)
gam_list <- lapply(best_gam_models, getViz)
lapply(gam_list, check, a.qq = list(method = "tnorm",
                             a.cipoly = list(fill = "light blue")),
       a.respoi = list(size = 0.2))


printGAM <- function(list){
  print(plot(list, allTerms = T), pages = 1)
}

lapply(gam_list, printGAM)
```

# SEM

```{r}
library(piecewiseSEM)
library(lme4)
library(future.apply)
library(progressr)  # Progress tracking

sem_data <- dailyDat |> 
  group_by(Site) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ (. - mean(., na.rm = TRUE)) / sd(., na.rm = TRUE), .names = "{.col}")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  drop_na() |> 
  mutate(waterYear = as.factor(waterYear),
         Season = as.factor(Season))

# Set up parallel processing
plan(multisession, workers = availableCores())  # Use all but one core

# Define predictor groups

# Define predictor groups
flow_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Flow") |> pull(Variable)
precip_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Precip") |> pull(Variable)
depth_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Depth") |> pull(Variable)
stic_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "STIC") |> pull(Variable)
network_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Network") |> pull(Variable)
delta_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Delta") |> pull(Variable)
temp_vars <- top_vars_df |> filter(Group == "Temporal") |> pull(Variable)

DOvars <- c("minDO.pctsat", "maxDO.pctsat", "avgDO.pctsat", "DOpctsat.amp", "DOSat.exc")

# Generate all valid predictor combinations
combinations <- expand.grid(
  flow = flow_vars,
  precip = precip_vars,
  depth = depth_vars,
  stic = stic_vars,
  network = network_vars,
  delta = delta_vars,
  temp = temp_vars,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

combinations <- combinations |> 
  mutate(combination_id = row_number())
# Function to fit hierarchical piecewise SEM for each combination
fit_sem <- function(idx, response, p) {
  predictors <- combinations[idx, ]
  
  # Update progress
  p(sprintf("Processing response: %s | Combination: %d/%d", response, idx, nrow(combinations)))

  # Build hierarchical piecewise SEM
  sem_model <- tryCatch(psem(
    lm(as.formula(paste(predictors$precip, "~ waterYear + Season")), data = sem_data),
    lm(as.formula(paste(predictors$depth, "~", predictors$precip)), data = sem_data),
    lm(as.formula(paste(predictors$stic, "~", predictors$precip)), data = sem_data),
    lm(as.formula(paste(predictors$network, "~", predictors$precip)), data = sem_data),
    lm(as.formula(paste(predictors$delta, "~", predictors$precip)), data = sem_data),
    lm(as.formula(paste(response, "~", paste(predictors$depth, predictors$stic, predictors$network, predictors$delta, sep = " + "))), data = sem_data),
    data = sem_data), error = function(e) NULL)

  # Check if model creation failed
  if (is.null(sem_model)) {
    return(NULL)
  }

  # Extract model fit metrics
  sem_summary <- summary(sem_model)
  aic_value <- sem_summary$AIC[1:2]
  r2 <-  mean(sem_summary$R2[,5])
  cStat <- sem_summary$Cstat
  
  return(list(
    response = response,
    combination_id = idx,
    AIC = aic_value,
    R2 = r2,
    cStat = cStat
  ))
}

# Enable progress tracking
handlers("txtprogressbar")

# Run in parallel for all response variables and combinations with progress tracking
results <- with_progress({
  p <- progressor(along = 1:(length(DOvars) * nrow(combinations)))
  
  future_lapply(1:nrow(combinations), function(idx) {
    lapply(DOvars, function(response) fit_sem(idx, response, p))
  })
})

extract_results <- function(results_list) {
  extracted_data <- do.call(rbind, lapply(results_list, function(result_group) {
    do.call(rbind, lapply(result_group, function(result) {
      if (is.null(result)) return(NULL)
      
      # Extract AIC values
      AIC_values <- result$AIC
      
      # Extract C-statistic values
      cStat_values <- result$cStat
      
      # Return structured data
      data.frame(
        response = result$response,
        combination_id = result$combination_id,
        AIC = AIC_values[1],
        AICc = AIC_values[2],
        R2 = result$R2,
        Fisher.C = cStat_values["Fisher.C"],
        df = cStat_values["df"],
        P.Value = cStat_values["P.Value"]
      )
    }))
  }))
  
  return(extracted_data)
}

# Apply function to extract data
df_results <- extract_results(results)

model_df <- df_results |> 
   arrange(response, AIC, desc(R2))

# Select the top 2 models for each response variable
best_models <- model_df |>
  group_by(response) |>
  slice_head(n = 2) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  left_join(combinations, by = "combination_id")
```

```{r}
# List to store fitted SEM models
fitted_models <- list()

# Loop through each best model and fit the SEM
```
